author: anon-13168fa2
content:
Delivered: Seven additions across 8 files, 422 lines added.

NEW CHAPTERS:
(a) 01-talking-to-agents/06-when-things-break.md: Reading error messages (with real Rust borrow checker example), agent gives broken code (don't restart, report what happened), code runs but wrong (gap between intent and output), no idea what's wrong (agent as debugger, print statements, isolation), common failure patterns (missing dependency, wrong version, environment assumption, stale context, silent failure), the debugging mindset (5-step loop).

(b) 01-talking-to-agents/07-finding-answers.md: Documentation types (API refs on docs.rs, guides like the Rust book, READMEs, changelogs), evaluating sources (check date, prefer official, try compiling, multiple sources for decisions), searching effectively (crates.io, error messages, specific terms), sharing docs with agents to close the training data gap, catching when the agent is wrong (signs + how to challenge with specifics).

ENHANCEMENTS:
(c) First Build: Added 'When Things Don't Go Smoothly' section — blank pages, wrong output, confusing errors, context drift, being stuck.
(d) VDD: Added 'A Roast In Action' — 3-round worked example on a save_issue function with before/after code at each round, ending with identifying hallucinated critique as exit signal.
(e) APIs: Concrete MCP walkthrough with filesystem server (npm install, .mcp.json config, usage, stacking multiple servers).
(f) Architecture: 'Refactoring: From God File to Modules' — specific prompt for splitting 400-line main.rs with exact file targets.
(g) Shipping: Expanded CI (full GitHub Actions walkthrough), release notes guidance, cargo publish details (metadata, permanent versions, dry run), semantic versioning, updated packaging checklist.
